title: The Father
tmdbOverview: A man refuses all assistance from his daughter as he ages and, as he tries to make sense of his changing circumstances, he begins to doubt his loved ones, his own mind and even the fabric of his reality.
synopsis: The Father (2020) is a drama film from United Kingdom and France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
